race.description: Kensei Club Community Race Day 5 July Hcp (C1)
race.comment: ALLEZE (2) talented colt resuming. Gave them a galloping lesson on debut when he led throughout as favourite over 1010m at Murwillumbah last October. Primed for this with the two trials and expected to remain unbeaten from the good gate. HIGHLAND FORCE (4) ploughed through the heavy (10) going on debut with a slick victory over 800m at Coffs Harbour. Kept fresh for this and expected to go close. AMORUSO (3) sat on the hot tempo with a game fifth over 1008m at Port Macquarie. Much better effort last start and stays in the mix. DEEBEE'S GIRL (7) consistent mare resuming. Showed a stack of improvement last time in and can go on with it this prep. Jumped in trip with a courageous on-pace second over 1250m at Kempsey. Has found a suitable race to kick off from the good gate. Respect.
